prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约10947→10568→9728→14216→17450，2021–2023年位次稳中有升（数字减小），2024年新高考改革后位次大幅后移约4488名，2025年 继续后移约3234名，近两年累计后移约7722名，呈明显下行趋势；2025年基准约17450名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划2021年95人、2022年96人、2023年92人 、2024年92人、2025年102人；2026年计划144人，较2025年大幅扩招约41.2%，扩招幅度显著，理论上会降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 主榜排名2026年约第67名（2025年第59名、2024年第54名），近年排名略有下滑，但仍属全国百强；2023年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总 排名第68位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台关注度中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，矿业工 程相关学科实力突出，与学校办学特色高度一致。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年甘肃省物理类考生估算约14.6万人，较2025年12.1万人增长约19.9%，考生规模显著扩大；省控 线方面，物理类本科批2024年370分、2025年374分，基本稳定；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，非本省高校；该校在甘肃省招生占比约1.2%–2.7%，属中等偏低水 平，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次连续大幅后移的下行趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约41.2%的宽松信号、以及甘肃省物理类考生增长约19.9%带 来的竞争加剧，扩招幅度（41.2%）显著超过考生增幅（19.9%），整体录取门槛预计进一步降低；预测2026年物理类最低位次约21560名，区间21060–22060名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 10947→10568→9728→14216→17450, rankings steadily increased from 2021 to 2023 (numbers decreased), after the 2024 new college entrance exam reform, rankings significantly dropped by about 4488 places, in 2025 continued to drop by about 3234 places, cumulative drop of about 7722 places in the last two years, showing a clear downward trend; 2025 baseline approximately 17450 places; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category: 2021 95 students, 2022 96 students, 2023 92 students, 2024 92 students, 2025 102 students; 2026 plan 144 students, a significant expansion of about 41.2% compared to 2025, the expansion rate is significant, theoretically lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 67th (2025 59th, 2024 54th), rankings have slightly declined in recent years, but still among the national top 100; 2023 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 68th, evaluation 'average', short video platform attention moderately low; no obvious filing gaps recorded; Safety Science and Engineering A+ (national top), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Mining Engineering related disciplines outstanding, highly consistent with the university's school-running characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 Gansu Physics Category candidates estimated approximately 146,000, an increase of about 19.9% compared to 2025's 121,000, candidate scale significantly expanded; provincial control line, Physics Category undergraduate batch 2024 370 points, 2025 374 points, basically stable; China University of Mining and Technology located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu about 1.2%–2.7%, moderately low, regional preference impact limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous significant downward trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the easing signal of a significant enrollment expansion of about 41.2% in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 19.9% increase in Gansu Physics Category candidates, the expansion rate (41.2%) significantly exceeds the candidate increase rate (19.9%), overall admission threshold is expected to further decrease; predict 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking approximately 21560, range 21060–22060.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 21560, range 21060–22060. Candidates with ranking within the lower limit of the range (21060) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical, Computer, Artificial Intelligence; candidates with ranking in the middle of the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like Safety Engineering (A+ discipline), Mechanical Category, Mathematics Category, while considering the university's flagship discipline advantages; candidates with ranking near the upper limit of the range are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Mining Category, Civil Category, Geology Category as safety options, while also paying attention to Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category. The university's Safety Science and Engineering A+ discipline is outstanding, offering high value for application.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2045 → 2083 → 1815 → 1753 → 2754. From 2021 to 2024, rankings steadily increased slightly (numbers decreased), but in 2025, there was a significant drop of about 1001 places, indicating a clear downward turning point. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2754. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for History Category was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, a reduction of about 17.6% compared to 2025, indicating a tightening of enrollment quotas.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, among the top 100 nationally, with stable level; reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal filing records; the university's liberal arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with the university's A+ discipline (Safety Science and Engineering), and the overall strength of liberal arts disciplines is relatively weak compared to engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Gansu Province is about 73,000, an increase of about 25.1% from 58,000 in 2025, a significant growth; regarding the provincial control line, the History Category undergraduate batch was 421 in 2024 and 412 in 2025, a slight decrease; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university; the number of History Category enrollments in Gansu Province is small (14–17), with a small enrollment scale, making ranking fluctuations susceptible to individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward trend of a significant drop of 1001 places in 2025 rankings, the tightening signal of a 17.6% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 25.1% increase in History Category examinees in Gansu Province, the dual pressure of enrollment reduction and candidate surge is expected to slightly raise the admission threshold in 2026 compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases), but the large drop in 2025 has formed a high base, limiting the rebound. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2522, with a range of 2068–2976.

The university offers few liberal arts majors (5), limiting choices, so candidates should consider personal interests and career prospects comprehensively.
